cloudfront.streamingdistribution.CfnAbou: This resource is deprecated. Amazon CloudFront is deprecating real-time messaging protocol (RTMP) distributions on December 31, 2020. For more information, [read the announcement](http://forums.aws.amazon.com/ann.jspa?annID=7356) on the Amazon CloudFront discussion forum.

cloudfront.streamingdistribution.Streami.Description: The current configuration information for the RTMP distribution.

cloudfront.streamingdistribution.Tags.Description: A complex type that contains zero or more `Tag` elements.
